caption: A screen recording captures a video call or presentation interface. A man wearing a dark baseball cap is visible in a small inset video window in the upper right corner. The main content area of the presentation consists of a black background with green text centered on the screen. The text reads, "Moments To provoke thoughts! To feel something!" across all frames. The interface includes a browser address bar at the top and several small icons and buttons associated with the video conferencing software. As the sequence progresses, the man in the inset window remains in a similar position, though his head tilts slightly and his facial expression shifts. The central green text remains static and unchanged throughout the clip, maintaining its position and wording.
